arts.ttl: Ipswich v Manchester City: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off at Portman Road Get in touch! You can email Dom here Well, there’s been no shortage of action in the earlier games. In a surprise to nobody, Brighton scored early at Manchester United and Nottingham Forest stormed into the lead against suffering Southampton … while Everton’s three-goal haul in 45 minutes at home is much more of a shocker – especially for Spurs. Follow it all with Rob Smyth. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester City Eyeing Douglas Luiz, Cambiaso Move Won’t Happen Until Summer
arts.sum: As the January transfer window progresses, Manchester City are contemplating further additions to their squad, with a particular focus on strengthening their midfield. The Athletic report how need for reinforcement in this area has become more pressing since Rodri's severe knee injury in September left a significant void in the team's central area. The post Manchester City Eyeing Douglas Luiz, Cambiaso Move Won’t Happen Until Summer appeared first on FootItalia.com.
